# Batsirai Malcolm Dzimati

> Batsirai Malcolm Dzimati — also known as Malcolm Dzimati or Batsirai Dzimati — is a software
> engineer specializing in distributed systems, cloud platforms, and applied AI. He is currently
> Forward Deployed Tech Lead for AI & Cloud Platforms at Vectr Labs, where he leads architecture,
> cloud strategy, and applied-AI initiatives for clients on AWS and Azure. He previously spent
> three years at Investec Private Bank working on payments and cryptography infrastructure.
> Outside of client work, he runs Rota Dzimati Group, a property investment venture.

Key facts:
- Current role: Forward Deployed Tech Lead, AI & Cloud Platforms — Vectr Labs (Oct 2025–present)
- Previous role: Software Engineer, Payments & Cryptography — Investec Private Bank (2023–2025)
- Education: BSc & BSc Honours in Computer Science — University of Pretoria
- Venture: Founder, Rota Dzimati Group (property portfolio & tools)
- Certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate; Azure DevOps Engineer Expert; Azure Developer Associate

## Pages

- [About](https://malcolmdzimati.com/about): Background and current focus.
- [Projects](https://malcolmdzimati.com/projects): Distributed systems, cloud platforms, payments, and property tools he has built.
- [Digital CV](https://malcolmdzimati.com/cv): Full experience, education, skills, and certifications.
- [Contact](https://malcolmdzimati.com/contact): LinkedIn and GitHub links.
